title: PicNova-AI Image Generator(Play Store)
description: PicNova is a modern AI-powered photo editing mobile application built with React Native, featuring AI face enhancement, old photo restoration, AI avatar generation, secure authentication, push notifications, AdMob monetization, and a premium UI/UX experience optimized for Android devices.
descriptionPoints: Secure authentication system with Email Login, Signup, and Google Sign-In integration.
Modern premium UI/UX with smooth mobile-first responsive design and animations.
AI face enhancement, image upscaling, and photo quality improvement tools.
Old photo restoration and black & white image colorization features.
AI avatar generation with multiple creative and professional styles.
Real-time push notifications and local system notification support.
Integrated AdMob monetization system with rewarded and banner ads.
Feature preview screens with sample images and reusable enhancement modal system.
Optimized React Native + Expo architecture for high performance on Android devices.
Scalable full-stack ready structure designed for Play Store production deployment.

title: HamdanPOS - Glass & Aluminum ERP System
description: Advanced POS and ERP system built for a leading glass & aluminum supplier in Riyadh, including full VPS deployment, real-time inventory, invoicing, and business analytics.
features: Complete POS and ERP solution tailored for the glass & aluminum industry.
Configured and deployed the full application on a VPS server independently.
Handled server setup, domain configuration, SSL, and production environment.
Real-time inventory tracking for products, sheets, and materials.
Sales, purchase, and invoice management with automated calculations.
Interactive dashboard with reports and business insights.
Optimized for high-volume transactions and performance.

title: Full-Stack E-commerce Mobile Solution
description: A premium cross-platform e-commerce mobile application built with React Native, featuring secure Stripe payments and real-time backend synchronization.
descriptionPoints: High-performance cross-platform app for Android & iOS.

title: ShadowSuite - Cybersecurity Marketplace
subtitle: Next.js Cybersecurity E-commerce Platform
description: ShadowSuite is a premium, secure cybersecurity marketplace built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. It provides a professional environment for exploring and purchasing advanced penetration testing tools, featuring real-time WhatsApp integration and optimized product visibility.
features: Architected a secure marketplace for specialized cybersecurity software.
Integrated instant customer support via WhatsApp API.
Implemented SEO-friendly dynamic routing for product pages.
descriptionPoints: Architected a secure marketplace for specialized cybersecurity software.
Integrated instant customer support via WhatsApp API.
Implemented SEO-friendly dynamic routing for product pages.

title: Basit Sanitary Store - Full Stack E-commerce
description: Comprehensive full-stack e-commerce solution with advanced filtering, secure auth, and a robust admin dashboard.
features: End-to-end e-commerce flow with cart and checkout.
Advanced admin panel for sales analytics.
REST API-driven architecture for fast processing.

title: Tap & Win - Real-time Prize Game App
description: An interactive, real-time lottery-style mobile game featuring animated reward mechanics and live socket communication.
